_authoring_notes: Velocity Section 1b: 3-column INFO BAR. Sits directly below the hero image.
Layout (per Jonathan 2026-04-30): WHEN | REGISTER | WHERE. Center column is the gold Register CTA; flanked by date and location.
Image-only hero above carries the brand identity; this strip carries the practical info + conversion path. Mid-page Section 8 Final CTA is the second/repeated CTA touchpoint per Template A.
Mobile responsive: 3-col grid stacks to single column at <=768px via inline <style> block in the HTML widget.
Eyebrow + primary text styling matches the hub-page pattern (gold uppercase eyebrow + navy primary text).
Register CTA renders as styled <a> inside the HTML widget rather than an Elementor button widget; visual identical, simpler markup, consistent with the rest of the cell content.
Renamed from 01b-register-cta.json on 2026-04-30 PM after Jonathan refined the section to the 3-col info bar.
